The '''SLD-14 shield generator''' was a kind of [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]], created by [[CoMar Combat Systems/Legends|CoMar Combat Systems]], that was used by both the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It produced a blue energy shield around a base that protected it from energy blasts and orbital bombardments. It did not however, prevent solid objects such as infantry, vehicles, or missiles, from entering the barrier, however it could be upgraded to stop missiles. Like all other shield generators, it required a [[Power generator/Legends|power generator]] to stay operational. They were also used by numerous other factions such as the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] and the [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]].
